style: Voxel chibi Roblox-friendly turnaround sheets; blocky/cubic geometry, cute face panels, four-view layout.

Strawberita.visual_rule: Use exact base colors and no aura; default version.
Gold/yellow material accents, subtle coin sparkles, rarity glow kept Roblox-friendly.
Soft rainbow gradient accents, small star particles, not too noisy.
Lime/green hazard accents, bubbles/drips, faint green aura.
Dark purple/blue accents, tiny star particles, faint orbit ring.
